name: York Traditions Bank
summary: York Traditions Bank, a community bank, provides commercial and consumer banking services in the Central Pennsylvania market. The company offers personal checking, savings/money market, and individual retirement accounts, as well as certificates of deposit; and loans and lines of credits, including personal, home equity, auto, and swing loans. It also provides business banking products and services comprising checking and savings/money market accounts, and certificates of deposit; business loans, such as lines of credit, COVID-19 relief loans, term loans, commercial mortgages, and government guaranteed loans; cash management services, which include sweep, automated clearing house, wire transfer, remote deposit capture, and merchant services, as well as zero balance accounts; and overdraft protection, night depositary, and safe deposit box services. In addition, it offers debit and credit cards, order checks, online, mobile, and telephone banking, bill pay, e-statements, and e-bills services. Further, the company also provides residential mortgage products which include fixed rate and adjustable rate mortgages, construction/permanent loans, and lot loans, as well as government loans. It operates six retail branches in York County, as well as a loan production office in Cumberland County. York Traditions Bank was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in York, Pennsylvania.
